name: Cottontail
Hare
Volcano Rabbit
Swamp Rabbit
description: The cottontail puzzles over the receding landscape, the foliage growing ever more curled and brown, sun-facing limbs sacrificed in the outstretched heat to bestow the slightest noon-day respite to those underneath... though little relief when the fires come.
<u>The hare</u> can still remember what a fresh rainy spring felt like, the sudden pours of invigoration, huddling underground and waiting to smell the sun and water, summer, fall, and winter.
<u>The volcano rabbit</u> samples the breeze, the air tasting hostile, saping the eyes, piercing the throat, withering lungs, and desiccating leaves.
<u>The swamp rabbit</u> hears the ocean, lap higher and further inland, waters uncomfortably warm, acidic and destitute.
trait: +1 PRE bonus when interacting with common creatures
blurb: Somehow the flies grow bigger and bigger every year.
Somehow the flies grow bigger and bigger every year.
Ashes blanket our pores like a too-warm blanket twisted around our ankles, unable to kick off on a swelting night.
The turbulent tides strain the treadbare leash of the Moon, desperate waves crashing in frenzies of coastal debris.

classes.name: Scrapper
classes.powers_description: You don't remember when you mastered:
powers: Adjacent allies get +1 STR for D4 rounds.
Charge 15 hops in a straight lin. All enemies in those spaces receive 1D4 damage.
Call down a large eagle who deals D6 damage to one above-ground target.
All enemies within 15 hops immediately make a morale check.
Select a location and receive 1 less damage when hit while on that space.
You may attack twice per round for D4 rounds.
background: rigorous calisthenics and stretching.
a thorough inspection of your gear.
staring far into the unmoving distance.
recalling a litany of slain foe.s
sharpening your tools and weapons.
a fond memory of fallen comrades.
classes.class_description: You have fought for so long and against foes innumerable that others aren't sure if you're entirely a rabbit anymore. Neither are you.

classes.name: Scufflewort
classes.powers_description: A knack for practical remedy, twice per day you can:
powers: Restore D4 HP to one adjacent creature
Allies within 15 hops gain +1 AGI for D4 rounds
All rabbits ignore darkness and gain +1 PRE for D4 rounds
Nearby non-rabbits have TOU -5 for D4 rounds
+5 to your next PRE or AGI check involving a non-rabbit
All rabbits in the area escape
classes.background_description: You hold a quiet and stalwart reverence for
background: the unreachable oaken boughs, shade bestowing.
the ponds crystal reflection, secret unknowing.
morning birdsong, carried on wind and wings.
floral meadow, blunting the heartache stings.
distant thunderstorm, roiling cloud and rain.
the path of ants, gracious in earthly stain.
classes.class_description: Soft of heart and stout of resolve, you believe the best use of paw is always in lifting those around you, especially in times of strife.

classes.name: Scamp
classes.powers_description: So you developed a knack for:
powers: During daw or dusk, you may use any 1 on a lucky die as a 6
+2 PRE or AGI for D4 rounds
Roll twice for next 2 theiving attempts
Non-rabbits cannot perceive you for D4 rounds
Roll twice for next 2 attack attempts
A medium area is pitch black for D4 rounds
classes.background_description: You were found and raised by
background: a crow.
a beaver.
a worm.
a dog.
a rat.
no one.
classes.class_description: Abandoned as a kit in a tumultuous spring, you've lived a scrappy life of trickery, cunning, and thievery.

classes.name: Shaman
classes.powers_description: In order to channel focus amongst the turmoil you have the gem:
powers: You attempt to reflect the sun's essence. Roll D20. For results above 10, it grows proportionally brighter and warmer. Below, the opposite.
Reach out and pull the cosmic threads and choose two different targets. Roll D8 and D6. Target 1: D8-D6 PRE and D6-D8 HP. Target 2: D6-D8 PRE and D8-D6 HP.
You attempt to focus the waves of the moon. Roll D20. For results above 10, gravity grows proportionally stronger. Below 10, the opposite.
Reach up to the threads of the celestial sphere and call upon their glow. Illuminate something hidden with D20x5 hops away.
Predict the result then roll D20. If within three, medium distance target is stunned and takes D6 damage. Otherwise half damage and you get -1 PRE for 2 rounds.
D4 electric damage vs TOU roll, and the bolt has a change to jump 5 hops.
classes.background_description: Their voice is so strong that you believe
background: listening to a waterfall can answer any question.
the deeper the burow, the greater the wisdom.
there are sky burrows above the trees.
the morning dew tells the fortune.
you can hear the cosmic serpent
the shadow points the way.
classes.class_description: There are wild voices everywhere, the whisper of leaves, drone of stones, cries of riverbed, hum of roots, they never cease. Murmur and shouts alike, you hear them all.

classes.name: Seedwhisker
classes.powers_description: You have an intuitive affinity for:
powers: Roll for each creature larger than a rabbit. If higher than their AGI, they become stuck for D4 rounds. Medium range.
Reduce negative weather effects by 1 for D4 rounds, all creatures in medium range.
Next time you would receive damage, it is prevented and half that damage is instead reflected onto the nearest opponent.
All rabbits within medium range share HP for D4 rounds (any damage or healing received can be spread across participants).
+3 STR and TOU for D4 rounds.
Speed=0 AGI=0 and +5 WIS for D4 rounds
classes.background_description: While growing up, you were helpless to prevent
background: a consuming brushfire that swept your home plains.
stifling drought that crumbled all but the deepest burrow.
a recurring ten-thousand year flood.
acidic gouging and dusty backwash of open-pit mining.
the echoic saws of old growth clear-cutting.
a meadow suffocated under a paved concrete slab.
classes.class_description: Unsettled by the times, traumatized by senseless events and catastrophe, you look to the larger balance for guidance, often ignoring the trees for the forest.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.powers_description: You can reach into the forbidden depths and call forth:
powers: Summon a sulfuric cloud of greenish hue. Roll against TOU for creatures in Medium range. Any who fail become Nauseated, otherwise -2 PRE for D4 rounds.
Conjure an echoing metallic din. Roll against PRE for all creatures in Medium range. Any who fail are Prone, otherwise -2 PRE for D4 rounds.
A yawning pit of muck opens beneath you. Roll against AGI for medium range target area. D4 damage, otherwise trapped until STR DR 12.
Intensely stale light bathes the area. Roll against WIS for all creatures in Long range. Any who fail are frozen, otherwise +2 PRE for D4 rounds.
The earth rumbles awkwardly far below you. Roll against AGI for creatures in long range. Fail gets D4 debris damage and prone.
The air crackles with humming vibration. Short range targetr confused for D4 rounds.
background: in a fur-harvesting factory.
beside an industrial waste water drain.
petri dish in a cold laboratory.
beneath a busy overpass.
in an overcrowded hutch in a suburban yard.
on a loosely covered landfill.
classes.class_description: The balance has long been sundered by chemicals and shining clouds of steel and grinding. Somehow you have an affinity for and even thrive among these incomprehensible monstrosities.

classes.name: Restless Skeleton
background: You now perpetually seek for the perfect patch of dirt in which to lay down to eternal rest.
You constantly cover yourself in found skins, attempting to warm and revitalize your bones.
You superstitiously avoid all reflective surfaces or confronting your own physical form.
You lovingly collect other small bones, hoping to reassemble them.
Seeking the Geode of Wishes.
You play haunting melodies mournfully on your arm bone like a flute.
powers: Target and everyone within medium range suffers D4-1 damage
D4 targets within medium range -2 STR for D4 rounds
Everyone within medium range Drowsy for D4 rounds
Target loses 1 ability for D4 rounds
Target is slow, -2 AGI and +4 TOU for D4 rouunds
classes.class_description: Now you mindlessly clutch and continue using your former posessions guided by the dry echoes of memory. Lose all spells.

classes.name: Afterlife Spirit
background: You feel perpetually cold now.
Everything feels dry and hollow.
Afraid of dissipation, you fear open spaces.
You usher and herd smaller ghosts.
You are enraged by the spiritless automamta run rampant.
Angry at God.
powers: Create a non-vocal sound for D4 rounds
Target within medium range is distracted by nostalgia, cannot act for one round and remembers a secret
Target within medium range has future visions, -2 PRE and AGI
Choose hot or cold: Large radiius increases or decreases in temperature for D4 rounds
classes.class_description: You have lost almost all connection to the corporeal plane, tethered only by tasks unfinished. Drop all items. Invisible, you cannot innately communicate with the living. During your turn, make a PRE check, and subtract twenty from the result. You may use that many words this turn.

guarded_by: the tendrils of cleansing sentient pyre
a visage of the lone jackalope
jets of boiling steam and bubbling tar
a stomping and petulant imperial inspector
a towering gardener and clouds of anger
rumored_to_be: a miraculous beast of magic horn and fur
unparalleled masters of wine and sour drink
crawling with spiders strong and wild
the bringer of chant and song
brothers posessed by a hidden wrath

descriptions: cool clear water emerges from the highest point nearby and flows to the lowest for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
a distinct flow of refreshing air presists for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
from water, trees, earth, and the very air, bugs emerge and behave as one collective for [D4/D6/D8] rounds and then returning
tectonic forces shift dirt and stone from one place to another in the presence of geologic time
[D4/D6/D8] greenery unfurls from the earth like spring passing in a few moments
temporarily speak the language of the cosmos, the intertwining patterns of all coalesce in your mind
the world of tiny ancient creatures glows at your feet and can hear your towering voice
a puff of spores appears over a [small/medium/large] area, persisting a light dusting of yellowish green for D4 rounds
microbes congeal microscopically on a [small/medium/large] surface and persist for D4 rounds before receding
attempt to place a weighted paw upon the scales of natural size and dimension
arouse a symbolic minor avatar for [D4/D6/D8] rounds (mud, lava, mist, smoke)
the life recedes from one [medium/large/small] area, draining and withering into dry ground beneath
level_1: a trickling stream
a strong breeze in a random D8 direction
D10 ants might follow the summoners commands
choose two small areas, one randomly becomes a hill, the other a ditch
small fragrant flowers randomly sprout
you can ask the elements for knowledge D4 questions
small patch of fungus appears nearby and reveals a distinct scent
roll TOU, success +3 WIS, fail -3 PRE and drowsy
surface becomes infectious
multiply your size by (D6/D4) for D4 rounds
random elemental with D4 HP
all creatures in a medium area lose D4 HP for that many rounds
level_2: a resounding river, all creatures in the path test AGI or be pushed medium distance
a firm wind in the chosen direction pushes all a short distance
2D10 bees appear and loosely do as they are directed
D6 medium stones erupt from the ground, test AGI or stunned and prone
stinging vines cover a medium area, -1 PRE and AGI for D4 rounds to touch
request D4 elements for assistance
medium patch of fungus will answer one question about the adjacent map
creatures in medium area +3 WIS, -3 PRE and drowsy until dissipated
surface becomes brittle
multiply your size by (D12/D4) for D4 rounds
mist or smoke elemental with 1D8 HP PRE+1
creatures in a large area lose D6 HP and WIS for that many rounds
level_3: tidal wave flattens all in its path, test TOU, success is stunned, failure is D12 damage
powerful gust of small width pushes everything in its path long distance
3D10 medium pincer beetles appear and act with zealous obedience
a medium canyon appears across the map, fall test TOU, fail D10 damage or stunned
large carnivorous trees burst forth and attack. D12 HP, D8 blunt dmg
issues D4 commands to one element
a large fungus will answer D4 questions about any location
all creatures get one of the following: +3 WIS, -3 PRE, or drowsy until dissipated
dissolve surface into an infectious pile of goo
multiply your size by (2D12/D4) for D4 rounds
elemental of choice with D12 HP STR+2
all creatures in small area lose D8 HP

descriptions: A handy remedy made from crushed leaves to draw out infection and restore health, requires Leaves
When held at just the right angle, the flower petals seem to shine like a midday moon, requires Flower
You feel a gentle nudge as a handy stick points the way, requires Twig
Hearty root fibers galvanize the body and spirit for D4 rounds, requires Root
A portable resorative these are often in high demand for their ethereal effects, requires Stem
A small seedlet with potent impact that lasts D4 rounds, requires Seeds
all senses are hindered and dulled by a numbing and inescapable vibration for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
mental faculties are reduced to thaht of wet clay, smooth and easily impressed upon for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
temporarily enveloped in an orb of quietude, from which no sound nor communications can be emitted or perceived for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
tepid contamination seeps up through the ground and imbues the target for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
slap the paws together and a rolling thunderclap leaps down from the sky and careens from their furry tips
stomp the feet and a rumbling crevasse arcs out across the ground showering sparks from colloding stones
level_1: restore D4 HP, DR 12 to remove poison or infection
light a medium area around you for D4 rounds
ask a question and learn the answer within 8 cardinal directions
one creature gains +2 to 2 random traits and -1 to two random traits
restores D4+X HP where X is the number of days since its preparation
+2 result to your next 2 rolls
target and surrounding medium area have -2 AGI
target and surrounding medium area have -2 PRE
creatures in medium area cannot use herbs
one weapon becomes poisonous
deal D4 damage to target
dry items within medium area catch fire
level_2: restore D6 HP, remove other negative effects
light a large area around you for D4 rounds, test PRE or be blinded
ask a question and receive the direction and distance
all creatures in a medium area gain +2 to 2 random traits
restores D4+2X where X is the number of days since preparation and removes any poison or infection
+3 to your next 3 rolls
all creatures in large area have -2 AGI
all creatures in large area have -2 PRE
creatures in a large area cannot use herbs or special abilities
any item becomes poisonous
D6 damage to target, on a 4,5, or 6 it deals half that to next closest creature
gout of flame erupts from small area dealing D6 damage plus fire
level_3: restore D8 HP, recipient is granted protection from negative effects for D4 rounds
light a large area and enemies blinded for D4 rounds
ask a question and see the answer in a vision
all allies in large area gain +3 to 2 chosen traits
restores D6+3X HP where X is the number of days since preparation and immune to ill effects for the rest of the day
+4 to your next 4 rolls
all non-allies in a medium area are stunned
creatures in a small area are susceptible to your commands
non-allies in a medium area cannot use herbs, special abilities or communicate
creatures in a small area become poisoned
roll D8, do that much damage to each of that many targets
roll D6, that many flame pits appear, dealing that much damage to any within them

descriptions: Reach out to all microplastics in a [small/medium/large] area and pull them towards you, each creature affected tests TOU
Chemicals seep into [2/3/4] nearby targets and render them unnatural and resistant to decay
A [small/medium/large] area becomes highly radioactive for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
A large putrid cloud descends nearby and reduces visibility to a short distance for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
Invoke a [simple/moderate/complex] electrical impulse with a metallic substance over a [small/medium/long] distance
Corrosive liquid seeps up from the ground into a medium size pool, spreading outward for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
Go into a trance and interpret the runic realm from beyond your consciousness at a [near/medium/far] distance
Become entranced as you interface with a mechanical apparatus of unnatural origin
Conjure the smoke and flame and heat of an engine for [D4/D6/D8] rounds, requires Machine
Inspire otherworldly movement of the elements through tunnels of lifeless dread
Assemble a forbidden [small/medium/large] elemental composed only of nearby refuse with [D4/D6/D8] HP, requires Garbage
A [small/medium/large] swarm of headless devouring creatures arrive, persisting for [D4/D6/D8] rounds
Oil and gas bubble from nearby crevices and seams and joints, creating [small/medium/large pools]
level_1: creatures take D4 damage, then a ball of plastic hurtles towards you, test AGI or D4 damage
gains +5 TOU, -5 WIS, and immunity to effects for D4 rounds
everything in area loses 1 HP per round of effect, with a chance to mutate DR 18
creatures test AGI, success lose -5 TOU and PRE while in the cloud, fail become poisoned
creatures touching metal take D4-1 damage with a chance to stun, machine may activate DR 16
target test TOU, lose 1 HP per round and equipment becomes brittle
receive the meaning of a runic scripture without retaining the runes themselves
you may receive/take direct information from a machine, fail become stunned for D4 rounds
test PRE to create sparks and smoke, otherwise nearby creatures blinded
test WIS to force liquid to move a short distance, otherwise it spills out
small elemental attacks anyone within range, HP D8, D4 melee, armor 0
D6 burrow beetles attack on ground, causing targets to lose 1 HP and become prone
create pool which is AGI DR 12 to to avoid, otherwise reduces max HP by 1 and AGI by 1 until cleaned
level_2: creatures take D6 damage, all are stunned
immunie to poison, radiation, infection, and acid, WIS permanently reduced by 2
items become hoto and machines function poorly for duration, mutate at DR 14
unprotected eyes incur 1 poison damage per round, all are blinded
electricity jumps, dealing D6 damage to all in area, acivate machines DR 14
target tests TOU, fail reduces HP max by 1 per round to noxious vapor, otherwise lose 1 HP per round
write a medium length runic message that influences those who read it
give D4 commands to machine, otherwise it deals D4 damage to nearest creature
test PRE to activate machine, on fail everything in small area takes D6 damage
test WIS to repair a structure of tubes, otherwise it is broken and the contents spray a medium area
medium elemental attacks anyone within range, HP D12, D4 medium range, armor 1
D8 lang fish bite and restrain enemies, machinery, and NPCs
all have HP reduced by half, movement reduced to minimum, and all attributes -5
level_3: creatures take D8 damage, a plastic golem congeals with HP equal to the total damage
gains armor 2 and comouflage to machines though distrusted by creatures
UNPROTECTED THINGS BECOME INERT OR ILL, MUTATE AT DR 10
breathing incurs 1 poison damage per round, joints malfunction, metal become brittle
choose the electricity path, creatures take D8 damage and stunned, activate machine DR 12
target test TOU or permanently dissolved by reducing HP and every ability 1 per round
PROJECT A SINGLE COMMAND INTO A LUMBER'S FEEBLE MIND
control machine for D6 rounds, otherwise become posessed
ACTIVATE MACHINE
build a plumbing network with nearby supplies
large elemental obeys your commands, HP D20, D4 melee damage, armor 2
D4 carnivores attack enemies, D6 damage, D8 HP
test AGI or become stuck and drown after D4 rounds

name: Sharpened Stick
Rusty Hook
Sling
Club
Rock
String
Pebbles
Piece of Glass
effect: a carefully crafted hardwood pike deals [D6/D8/D10] damage at short range [/and enhanced with thistle/and enhanced with thorns]
a large found hook deals [D6/D8/D10] damage at short range with a chance to infect (DR [16/14/12])
a grassy sling that deals [D4/D6/D8] damage at long range with ([1/2/3]) projectiles
a hefty stem deals [D6/D8/D10] damage at short range witih a chance to disarm (DR [16/14/12])
a wedge of granite deals [D6/D8/D10] damage at short range with a chance to stun (DR [16/14/12])
a whip--like string deals [D4/D6/D8] damage at medium range with a chance to hold (DR [16/14/12])
thrown pebbles deal [D2/D4/D6] damage at medium range with a chance to stun (DR [16/14/12])
a shard of tempered glass deals [D8/D10/D12] damage at short range and enhanced with a chance to ignore armor (DR [16/14/12]) or fragment
